name: IRC_APPLY_FLOWS_VL
query: SELECT B.APPLY_FLOW_ID APPLY_FLOW_ID, B.AF_CODE AF_CODE, B.AF_TYPE_CODE AF_TYPE_CODE, B.AF_STATUS_CODE AF_STATUS_CODE, TL.APPLY_FLOW_NAME APPLY_FLOW_NAME, TL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_APPLY_FLOWS_B B, IRC_APPLY_FLOWS_TL TL WHERE B.APPLY_FLOW_ID = TL.APPLY_FLOW_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
